tools.name: get_nuxt_i18n_docs
tools.description: Retrieve full markdown documentation specifications for Nuxt i18n v8 by topic (e.g. getting-started/setup, guide/routing).

topic.description: The topic of the documentation to retrieve.

tools.name: search_nuxt_i18n_docs
tools.description: Search documentation for nuxt-i18n-docs using a query string.

query.description: The search query to match against titles and descriptions.

searchIndex.title: Installation
searchIndex.description: Get started with Nuxt i18n module.

searchIndex.title: Usage
searchIndex.description: The basics to get started with the Nuxt i18n module

searchIndex.title: Vue I18n Configuration
searchIndex.description: Configuring runtime options for Vue I18n

searchIndex.title: Routing Strategies
searchIndex.description: Nuxt i18n module overrides Nuxt default routes to add locale prefixes to every URL with routing strategies.

searchIndex.title: Runtime Hooks
searchIndex.description: Nuxt i18n module provides runtime hooks that you can use to perform specific tasks based on your app's language.

searchIndex.title: Custom Route Paths
searchIndex.description: Customize the names of the paths for specific locale.

searchIndex.title: Ignoring Localized Routes
searchIndex.description: Customize localized route exclusions per page component.

searchIndex.title: Browser language detection
searchIndex.description: Detect user browser's language.

searchIndex.title: SEO
searchIndex.description: When the `useLocaleHead` is called, @nuxtjs/i18n attempts to add some metadata to improve your pages SEO. Here's what it does.

searchIndex.title: Lazy-load translations
searchIndex.description: How to lazy-load translations.

searchIndex.title: Lang Switcher
searchIndex.description: How to change your website's current language.

searchIndex.title: Different Domains
searchIndex.description: Use a different domain name for each language your app supports.

searchIndex.title: Multi domain locales
searchIndex.description: Set up multiple domains for multiple locales. Use a different domain name for each language your app supports.

searchIndex.title: Locale fallback
searchIndex.description: How a fallback gets selected when a translation is missing.

searchIndex.title: Per-Component Translations
searchIndex.description: Inline your translation messages within your components.

searchIndex.title: Extending messages hook
searchIndex.description: Nuxt hooks to extend i18n messages in your project.

searchIndex.title: Extending pages
searchIndex.description: Adding localized pages from a module.

searchIndex.title: Layers
searchIndex.description: Using layers to extends projects with Nuxt i18n.

searchIndex.title: Server-Side Translations
searchIndex.description: Translate on the server-side and return it as a response.

searchIndex.title: Module integration
searchIndex.description: How to integrate Nuxt i18n inside of a module.

searchIndex.title: Migration Guide
searchIndex.description: Follow this guide to upgrade from v9.x to v10.x

searchIndex.title: New features
searchIndex.description: What's new in v10

searchIndex.title: Options
searchIndex.description: All the options you can use to configure Nuxt I18n.

searchIndex.title: Vue I18n
searchIndex.description: Extension of Vue I18n

searchIndex.title: Vue
searchIndex.description: Extension of Vue.

searchIndex.title: Nuxt
searchIndex.description: I18n Other APIs related to Nuxt.

searchIndex.title: Runtime config
searchIndex.description: i18n runtime config options.

searchIndex.title: <NuxtLinkLocale>
searchIndex.description: A shorthand component for using localePath with <NuxtLink>

searchIndex.title: <SwitchLocalePathLink>
searchIndex.description: An enhanced constrained <NuxtLink> for rendering paths resolved from switchLocalePath

searchIndex.title: useLocalePath
searchIndex.description: The useLocalePath() composable returns a function that resolves a path according to the current locale.

searchIndex.title: useLocaleRoute
searchIndex.description: The useLocaleRoute() composable returns a function that resolves the route according to the current locale.

searchIndex.title: useSwitchLocalePath
searchIndex.description: The useSwitchLocalePath() composable returns a function that allows to switch the locale.

searchIndex.title: useLocaleHead
searchIndex.description: The useLocaleHead() composable returns localized head properties for locale-related aspects.

searchIndex.title: useSetI18nParams
searchIndex.description:
The useSetI18nParams() returns a function to set translated parameters for the current route.
For more details on its usage see the Lang Switcher guide.

searchIndex.title: useRouteBaseName
searchIndex.description: The useRouteBaseName() composable returns a function that gets the route's base name.

searchIndex.title: useBrowserLocale
searchIndex.description: The useBrowserLocale() composable returns the browser locale.

searchIndex.title: useCookieLocale
searchIndex.description: The useCookieLocale() composable returns the cookie locale.

searchIndex.title: useTranslation
searchIndex.description: The useTranslation() composable returns the translation function.

searchIndex.title: defineI18nConfig
searchIndex.description: The defineI18nConfig() composables is used to define a function which returns the vue-i18n configuration which is passed to the createI18n() options on the Nuxt I18n module.

searchIndex.title: defineI18nLocale
searchIndex.description: The defineI18nLocale() composable is used to define a function to dynamically load locale messages used for lazy-loading translations.

searchIndex.title: defineI18nLocaleDetector
searchIndex.description: The defineI18nLocaleDetector() is composable used to define a function which detects the locale on the server-side, it's called per request on the server.
